subject: [PATCH 09/19] nfsd: remove premature NFS4_OO_CONFIRMED in CLAIM_PREVIOUS path

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch removes a premature setting of the NFS4_OO_CONFIRMED flag in the CLAIM_PREVIOUS path of the nfsd kernel module. The flag is set too early, causing it to remain permanently confirmed even if an open operation fails. The correct success-path setter already exists in init_open_stateid(). This change only affects pre-NFSv4.1 sessions and fixes a bug introduced by a previous patch.
